escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with US-Iran ceasefire talks, Israel-Lebanon negotiations, and ongoing Russian offensive in Ukraine.

ticker_items: US-Iran ceasefire talks resume in Pakistan after 48-day war
Israel-Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire after 34 years
US naval blockade halts 90% of Iran's sea trade
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drone attack on Ukraine
North Korea rapidly expanding nuclear weapons production capability

eastern_europe.description: Russian missile and drone strikes killed 14 civilians in overnight attacks.

middle_east.description: Sirens sounded in northern Israel following drone infiltration from Lebanon.
Israeli strikes continue in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire announcement.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll
US soldiers killed in Iran conflict

ukraine.text: Ukraine's top diplomatic priority is securing allies' help to buy and build more air defense systems
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea
middle_east.speaker: Brad Cooper
middle_east.title: CENTCOM Commander

middle_east.text: Trump Would Welcome End of Hostilities, Peace Between Israel and Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Senior U.S. Official
middle_east.title: Senior U.S. Official

middle_east.text: Pakistan's effective and responsible role in ending war is commendable
middle_east.speaker: Masoud Pezeshkian
middle_east.title: Iranian President

middle_east.text: Lebanon and Israel have agreed that in order to achieve peace between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day ceasefire
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Pakistan continues mediating US-Iran talks in Islamabad as negotiations resume after initial round failed to reach agreement. Pakistani officials expressing optimism for breakthrough in second round of talks.

Italy suspended automatic renewal of defense agreement with Israel over Lebanon campaign. Prime Minister Meloni announced decision during speech in Verona amid increasing criticism of Israeli operations.
Poland urging EU to release €90 billion Ukraine loan following Orbán's ouster from Hungary. Polish officials argue increased financial support could affect ceasefire prospects and regional dynamics.
Australia announces defense spending increase to 3% of GDP by 2033 citing growing global threats. Decision follows pressure from Trump administration for allies to boost military expenditures.
IAEA chief warns of rapid increase in North Korean nuclear weapons production at Yongbyon reactor. Kim Jong Un oversaw cruise missile and anti-warship missile tests from naval destroyer over weekend.
China vetoed UN Security Council resolution on Strait of Hormuz freedom of navigation alongside Russia. Reports suggest Iran used Chinese satellites to target US bases, which China denies.

financial.notes: US naval blockade halting 90% of Iran's sea trade creating economic pressure on Tehran.

update_log.text: Israel-Lebanon 10-day ceasefire begins with civilians returning to homes in southern Lebanon.
Pentagon pushes US automakers to produce arms as arsenals deplete during Iran war.
Pakistani Army Chief meets Iranian Parliament Speaker in Tehran for ceasefire mediation.
IAEA warns North Korea rapidly increasing nuclear weapons production capability at Yongbyon reactor.
Israel-Lebanon ceasefire begins with celebrations in Lebanon and direct talks planned
US-Iran talks resume in Islamabad with Pakistani mediation on day 49 of conflict
Russian strikes kill 14 civilians in Ukraine as allies pledge 120,000 UK drones
CENTCOM reports US blockade halting 90% of Iran's sea trade within 36 hours
